products.name: Meridian Automatic Chronograph
products.description: A precision chronograph housed in brushed stainless steel, with a sunburst black dial and sapphire crystal.

products.name: Calibre Noir
products.description: All-black PVD case with a skeletonised movement visible through the case back.

products.name: Abyssal Diver 300
products.description: 300m water resistance, unidirectional bezel, and a Super-LumiNova dial for deep-sea legibility.

products.name: Aria Mother-of-Pearl
products.description: A refined dress watch with a genuine mother-of-pearl dial and diamond hour markers.

products.name: Vantage Smart Luxury
products.description: Hybrid smart-luxury timepiece with heart-rate tracking hidden behind a traditional analog face.

products.name: Obsidian Limited Edition
products.description: Limited to 200 pieces worldwide. Meteorite dial, 18k gold hands, individually numbered.

products.name: Regent GMT
products.description: Dual time-zone GMT complication for the frequent traveller, finished in two-tone steel and gold.

products.name: Lumière Rose Quartz
products.description: Rose-gold plated case with a soft pink sunray dial, designed for everyday elegance.

products.name: Centurion Perpetual Calendar
products.description: A perpetual calendar complication that tracks leap years automatically until 2100.

products.name: Voyager Pilot Chronograph
products.description: Oversized pilot case with a bidirectional bezel and legible high-contrast dial.

products.name: Solène Emerald Cocktail
products.description: Emerald-cut crystal bezel surrounding a deep green lacquered dial.

products.name: Ironclad Field Watch
products.description: Rugged matte-finish field watch built for durability without sacrificing refinement.

products.name: Monarch Tourbillon
products.description: A hand-finished flying tourbillon, visible through an open aperture at six o'clock.

products.name: Coastline Quartz Diver
products.description: An accessible quartz diver with 200m water resistance and a ceramic bezel insert.

products.name: Belmont Skeleton
products.description: Fully open-worked movement on both dial and case back, framed in polished steel.

products.name: Elysian Sapphire
products.description: A sapphire-crystal case back reveals the automatic movement beneath a midnight-blue dial.
